groundwater_level.note: Indore assessment unit is CGWB-classified Over-Exploited; value is a representative district depth-to-water (post-monsoon).

groundwater_quality.label: Generally potable; moderate hardness, local nitrate

gas_png.note: Indore is an authorised City Gas Distribution area; piped natural gas is available across much of the city.

electricity.source: MP Paschim Kshetra Vidyut Vitaran Co.
